The main financial data section (2.1 主要会计数据和财务指标) 2. The consolidated income statement (5.1.2 合并利润表) Let me start by opening section 2.1 which usually contains key financial metrics including comprehensive income. {"action":"open","anchor_id":"2.1","expected_evidence":"归属于母公司所有者的综合收益总额 or similar comprehensive income metric"} （一）主要会计数据和财务指标 公司是否需追溯调整或重述以前年度会计数据 □是 区否 |-|本报告期|上年同期|本报告期比上年同期增减（%）| |---|---|---|---| |营业收入（元）|395,916,547.11|377,991,835.41|4.74%| |归属于上市公司股东的净利润（元）|2,274,575.49|1,759,465.86|29.28%| |归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性

末增减（%）| |总资产（元）|1,979,356,615.05|1,845,268,199.04|7.27%| |归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益（元）|1,307,494,764.11|1,303,868,026.09|0.28%|（二）非经常性损益项目和金额 --- Round 2 --- I opened section 2.1 which contains the main financial data. I can see several metrics including: - 营业收入 (Operating revenue) - 归属于上市公司股东的净利润 (Net profit attributable to shareholders of the listed company) - 归属于上市公司股东的扣除非经常性损益的净利润 (Net profit after deducting non-recurring gains/losses) - 经营活动产生的现金流量净额 (Net cash flow from operating activities) - 基本每股收益 (Basic EPS) - 稀释每股收益 (Diluted EPS) - 加权平均净资产收益率 (Weighted average ROE) - 总资产 (Total assets) - 归属于上市公司股东的所有者权益 (Owner's equity attributable to shareholders of the listed company) However, I do NOT see "归属于母公司所有者的综合收益总额" (Total comprehensive income attributable to owners of the parent company) in this section. This metric is different from net profit - it includes other comprehensive income items. Let me check the consolidated income statement (5.1.2 合并利润表) which should contain the comprehensive income statement with this specific metric.
